title: Insight Companion Project Idea
description: Project idea for building a simple Node.js and Express website that acts as a personalized AI learning companion, helping users ask questions, check understanding, discover knowledge gaps, receive follow-up suggestions, and store learning history.
note: Requires clean component-based code structure, simple maintainable architecture, and a final report covering architecture and usage.
